description: This file defines the MainActivity class for an Android application, handling app lifecycle, user interface rendering for login, locked, and main screens, biometric authentication, and error handling.

classes.name: MainActivity
classes.description: Main activity class managing app lifecycle, user interface screens, authentication flow, biometric authentication, and error handling.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Initializes the activity, sets up UI, and handles startup errors.

methods.name: onResume
methods.description: Handles activity resumption, triggers UI rendering based on app state.

methods.name: render
methods.description: Determines which UI to display based on app state: login, locked, or main.

methods.name: showFatalStartupScreen
methods.description: Displays a fallback UI when startup fails due to an exception.

methods.name: showInitFailure
methods.description: Shows a message when app initialization fails.

methods.name: showLogin
methods.description: Displays login screen and handles login actions.

methods.name: showLocked
methods.description: Displays lock screen with biometric authentication.

methods.name: showMain
methods.description: Displays main app UI with session info and API call button.

methods.name: setRoot
methods.description: Replaces the current UI view in the container.
